faithful_note: Bloom = threshold + Gaussian (kernel VERIFIED, see PAEGaussianBlur) + composite. The embedded ddb (7.0) is the threshold/bloom COMPOSITE stages (glow.ts), and the worst points are t=0.1 across ALL params = whole-bloom-output offset, not one param. Blur sub-component is faithful; the composite pipeline (threshold curve, additive blend, clip-to-white ordering) is the residual + it feeds a multi-stage host.
